Extended curriculum information: {"available": true, "description": "BSc programmes in the biological, physical or mathematical sciences are also available as extended curriculum programmes, adding one extra year of study with a special first-year curriculum", "minimum_consideration_rules": {"biological_sciences": [{"combination": 1, "Mathematics": "At least 60%", "Physical_Sciences": "At least 50%", "Aggregated_Average_Required": "60%", "aggregate_note": "Excluding Life Orientation"}, {"combination": 2, "Mathematics": "At least 55%", "Physical_Sciences": "At least 50%", "Aggregated_Average_Required": "65%", "aggregate_note": "Excluding Life Orientation"}, {"combination": 3, "Mathematics": "At least 60%", "Physical_Sciences": "At least 45%", "Aggregated_Average_Required": "65%", "aggregate_note": "Excluding Life Orientation"}], "physical_and_mathematical_sciences": [{"combination": 1, "Mathematics": "At least 70%", "Physical_Sciences": "At least 50%", "Aggregated_Average_Required": "60%", "aggregate_note": "Excluding Life Orientation"}, {"combination": 2, "Mathematics": "At least 65%", "Physical_Sciences": "At least 50%", "Aggregated_Average_Required": "65%", "aggregate_note": "Excluding Life Orientation"}, {"combination": 3, "Mathematics": "At least 70%", "Physical_Sciences": "At least 45%", "Aggregated_Average_Required": "65%", "aggregate_note": "Excluding Life Orientation"}]}}.
